arts.ttl: Pundits agree in Aston Villa v Wolves predictions with Jhon Duran over Ollie Watkins debated
arts.sum: He said: "I didn't captain Ollie Watkins in my Fantasy team last week, when he scored a double against Everton, but Jhon Duran coming on to score Villa's winner in that game shows the depth in their squad to cope. Aston Villa have little time to dwell on success in the Champions League, with the focus quickly shifting back towards the visit of Wolves in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Former Rangers chief makes astonishing Steven Gerrard to Aston Villa claim in scathing attack
arts.sum: Former Rangers chairman Dave King has made a surprise new claim, stating that Steven Gerrard was 'kicked out' of the Scottish club to go to Aston Villa and did in fact not wish to leave. Gerrard would only last just shy of the 12-month mark at Villa Park, having taken the club to a mixed end to the 2021/22 campaign before winning only two of 12 opening games before the winter World Cup in the next term.

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard didn't want Rangers exit for Aston Villa and was 'kicked out', claims Dave King
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard didn't want to to leave Rangers for Aston Villa when he did and was "kicked out", according to Dave King. But King claims that while Gerrard did ultimately want a move back to England at some point, at that time he would have preferred to stay at Ibrox for longer.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa starting XI vs Wolves predicted as Emery faces two big decisions
arts.sum: Aston Villa are looking to win four of their first five Premier League games of a season for only the fourth time as West Midlands rivals Wolves head to Villa Park on Saturday (3pm kick-off). Predicted Villa XI vs Wolves: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Pau, Digne, Onana, Tielemans, Bailey, Rogers, McGinn, Watkins.

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard was 'kicked OUT' of Rangers as Dave King claims broken promises sparked Aston Villa move
arts.sum: King says the former manager was 'absolutely kicked out' of a club he didn't want to leave

Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers - Sat, Sep 21st 2024, 15:00 Aston Villa were back in training on Thursday as they prepare for the visit of Wolverhampton Wanderers. The Villans enjoyed a successful start to their UEFA Champions League campaign against BSC Young Boys on Tuesday evening. But attention swiftly switches back to Premier League matters and the visit of neighbours Wolves this Saturday. Unai Emery’s side will be bidding to make it three wins in a week when the action gets underway at Villa Park. You can view the latest images from Bodymoor Heath below…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star Morgan Rogers makes his feelings clear on playing Wolves
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Midlands rivals Wolves this weekend after an eye-catching start to the campaign under Unai Emery and one of their stars of the season Morgan Rogers has sent a message to his teammates

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Eye Move for 'Amazing' Free Agent for Unai Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa are among the clubs eyeing a move for free agent Turkey international Yusuf Yazici.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa lineup vs. Wolves: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Aston Villa could line up in Saturday's Premier League clash with Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Preview: Aston Villa vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Aston Villa and Wolverhampton Wanderers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
